info.name: BarterX API - Complete Collection Copy
info.description: Complete API collection for BarterX barter marketplace

request.description: Register a new user with JSON body (existing flow). No avatar upload.

formdata.description: Profile picture (optional). Max 5MB. Formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP

request.description: Register a new user with form-data including optional avatar upload. Avatar will be resized to 400x400 and uploaded to barterx/avatars folder. If avatar upload fails, user is still registered but a warning is returned.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "ITEM_OFFERING",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "title": "iPhone 12 Pro",
  "description": "Excellent condition, 256GB, Space Gray",
  "condition": "Excellent",
  "location": "San Francisco, CA",
  "priceMode": "POINTS",
  "pricePoints": 500,
  "photos": ["https://example.com/photo1.jpg"]
}

{
  "type": "SERVICE_OFFERING",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "title": "Guitar Lessons",
  "description": "1 hour beginner guitar lessons",
  "location": "Online or In-Person",
  "priceMode": "BARTER",
  "barterWanted": "Willing to trade for home-cooked meals or cleaning services"
}

{
  "type": "ITEM_OFFERING",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "title": "Mountain Bike",
  "description": "Trek mountain bike, 21-speed, great condition",
  "condition": "Good",
  "location": "Portland, OR",
  "priceMode": "BOTH",
  "pricePoints": 350,
  "barterWanted": "Or trade for camping gear",
  "photos": ["https://example.com/bike1.jpg", "https://example.com/bike2.jpg"]
}

query.description: Filter by listing type: ITEM_OFFERING, ITEM_NEED, SERVICE_OFFERING, SERVICE_NEED
Filter by intent: OFFERING (items/services offered) or NEED (items/services needed)
Filter by price mode: POINTS, BARTER, BOTH

request.description: Instantly purchase a listing at its listed price without negotiation. Creates a trade with ACCEPTED status. Points are escrowed immediately. Both parties must still confirm delivery. Message is optional - can send empty body {}.
Send a message in the trade chat. Available for PENDING, ACCEPTED, and COMPLETED (read-only) trades. Blocked for CANCELLED trades. Maximum content length: 2000 characters.

item.name: Chat - Send Message (Empty Content - Validation Error)

request.description: Test validation: Empty message content should return 400 error.

item.name: Chat - Send Message (Content Too Long - Validation Error)

request.description: Test validation: Message content exceeding 2000 characters should return 400 error.
Test error handling: Sending message to non-existent trade should return 404 error.
Retrieve chat messages for a trade with pagination. Returns messages in reverse chronological order (newest first).
Test pagination: Get second page with 20 messages per page.

query.description: ISO timestamp - Get only messages after this time (for polling)

request.description: Polling mode: Fetch only new messages created after the specified timestamp. Useful for real-time chat updates.
Test error handling: Getting messages from non-existent trade should return 404 error.
Mark all unread messages from the other participant as read. Returns count of messages marked.

item.name: Chat - Mark Messages as Read (Trade Not Found)

request.description: Test error handling: Marking messages as read for non-existent trade should return 404 error.
Get the count of unread messages from the other participant for this specific trade.

item.name: Chat - Get Unread Count (Trade Not Found)

request.description: Test error handling: Getting unread count for non-existent trade should return 404 error.
Get unread message counts for all trades where the user is a participant. Returns array of {tradeId, unreadCount} objects.

query.description: Filter by listing type: ITEM_OFFERING, ITEM_NEED, SERVICE_OFFERING, SERVICE_NEED
Filter by intent: OFFERING (items/services offered) or NEED (items/services needed)
